function.name: bash
function.description: Run a command with bash. Output is the combined terminal-visible stdout/stderr stream.

description.description: Briefly describe the action this tool call will perform.

command.description: Complete bash command string to run.

working_directory.description: Directory for the command. Relative paths are resolved from workspace_root.

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000 and is capped at 600000.

is_background.description: If true, start the command in the background and do not capture output.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file by absolute path, with optional line ranges for text files and page ranges for PDFs.

file_path.description: 要读取的文件绝对路径。

limit.description: 要读取的行数；仅当文件过大、无法一次读取时提供。

offset.description: 开始读取的行号；仅当文件过大、需要分段读取时提供。

pages.description: PDF 页码范围，例如 "1-5"、"3"、"10-20"；仅适用于 PDF 文件，每次最多 20 页。

function.name: write
function.description: Write text content to an absolute file path, creating parent directories and replacing existing content.

file_path.description: Absolute destination file path. Relative paths are rejected; parent directories are created when missing.

content.description: Full text content to write, replacing any existing file contents.

function.name: edit
function.description: Edit a file by replacing exact text at an absolute file path.

file_path.description: Absolute path of the file to modify. Relative paths are rejected.

old_string.description: Exact text to replace, including whitespace and indentation.

new_string.description: Replacement text; use a value different from old_string.

replace_all.description: Replace every occurrence when true; defaults to false, which replaces only the first match.

function.name: edit_notebook
function.description: 编辑 Jupyter 笔记本的单元格：修改已有单元格或插入新单元格。

description.description: Briefly describe the action this tool call will perform.

target_notebook.description: 文件路径。支持绝对路径、~/Desktop/xxx、或相对于工作区的相对路径。

cell_idx.description: 要编辑或插入位置的单元格索引（从 0 开始）。

is_new_cell.description: true=新建单元格；false=编辑已有单元格。

old_string.description: 要替换的单元格内容；新建单元格时传空字符串。

new_string.description: 新内容或新单元格的完整内容。

function.name: read_lints
function.description: 读取工作区或指定文件/目录的 linter 诊断信息。

description.description: Briefly describe the action this tool call will perform.

paths.description: 要检查的文件或目录路径列表；不传则返回整个工作区诊断（本实现返回说明）。

function.name: glob
function.description: Find files by glob pattern under a directory and return matching file paths.

path.description: Directory to search. Omit this field to use the workspace root; do not pass "undefined" or "null". If provided, it must be an existing directory path.

pattern.description: Glob pattern used to match file paths, for example "*.py" or "**/*.ts".

function.name: grep
function.description: 按精确文本或正则表达式在文件中搜索，支持上下文行数、文件类型、大小写等选项。

-A.description: Number of lines to show after each match (rg -A). Requires output_mode: "content", ignored otherwise.

-B.description: Number of lines to show before each match (rg -B). Requires output_mode: "content", ignored otherwise.

-n.description: Show line numbers in output (rg -n). Requires output_mode: "content", ignored otherwise. Defaults to true.

context.description: Number of lines to show before and after each match (rg -C). Requires output_mode: "content", ignored otherwise.

glob.description: Glob pattern to filter files (e.g. "*.js", "*.{ts,tsx}") - maps to rg --glob

head_limit.description: Limit output to first N lines/entries, equivalent to "| head -N". Works across all output modes: content (limits output lines), files_with_matches (limits file paths), count (limits count entries). Defaults to 250 when unspecified. Pass 0 for unlimited (use sparingly — large result sets waste context).

multiline.description: Enable multiline mode where . matches newlines and patterns can span lines (rg -U --multiline-dotall). Default: false.

offset.description: Skip first N lines/entries before applying head_limit, equivalent to "| tail -n +N | head -N". Works across all output modes. Defaults to 0.

output_mode.description: Output mode: "content" shows matching lines (supports -A/-B/-C context, -n line numbers, head_limit), "files_with_matches" shows file paths (supports head_limit), "count" shows match counts (supports head_limit). Defaults to "files_with_matches".

path.description: File or directory to search in (rg PATH). Defaults to current working directory.

pattern.description: The regular expression pattern to search for in file contents

type.description: File type to search (rg --type). Common types: js, py, rust, go, java, etc. More efficient than include for standard file types.

function.name: web_search
function.description: 在网络上搜索实时信息，用于获取最新资讯或验证事实。

description.description: Briefly describe the action this tool call will perform.

search_term.description: 搜索关键词或完整查询。

function.name: web_fetch
function.description: 根据 URL 抓取网页内容并转换为可读的 Markdown；不支持需认证或本地/私有地址。

description.description: Briefly describe the action this tool call will perform.

url.description: 要抓取的完整有效 URL，仅支持 http/https 公网地址。
